name: Mistral Large 2 (24.07)
license: Mistral Research License (non-commercial; commercial license required for production)
note: 123B open-weights flagship rivaling Llama 3.1 405B on code/math (research license); fully retired from Mistral's API as of 2025.
tpsNote: 123B model exceeds a single RTX 4090's 24GB VRAM even at Q4; requires multi-GPU or CPU offload.

results.notes: HF model card 'Instruction Benchmarks' table; cross-confirmed against the bar chart in the mistral.ai launch blog.
HF model card 'Code & Reasoning Benchmarks' table (Human Eval Plus row).
HF model card 'Code & Reasoning Benchmarks' table (MBPP Plus row).

HF card's 'Math Instruct (0-shot, no CoT)' figure; cross-confirmed by directly reading the bar chart on the mistral.ai launch blog. Mistral also reports a '0-shot, CoT' variant at 71.5% on the same table; the no-CoT figure was chosen since it is the one independently corroborated by the blog chart.

From the HF 'Evaluation results' auto-generated widget, backed by the community EvalEval automated eval-results datastore - not a number Mistral wrote into their own benchmark tables, hence independent rather than self-reported.

LogicKor official leaderboard, model_id mistralai/Mistral-Large-Instruct-2407, default prompt strategy [score corrected during adversarial verify: proposed 9.04 -> 9.03, per verifier: Fetched https://lk.instruct.kr/ live (browser tab, full page text extracted, not just WebFetch summary — cross-checked twice). Row 16 lists mistralai/Mistral-Large-Instruct-2407, prompt strategy "default", 총점 (overall) = 9.03, params 123B, license mrl — matching the target model file (corpus/models/mistral-ai/mistral-large-2-24-07.json, HF id mistralai/Mistral-Large-Instruct-2407, 123B dense, MRL license). Claimed score 9.04 is off by 0.01. Model, benchmark, and variant (default, not 1-shot=9.16 or cot-1-shot=7.48) are all correctly identified in the claim — this is a simple digit/transcription error, not a wrong-model or wrong-variant mixup. Note: this benchmark result is not currently present in the model's JSON file (only mmlu, humaneval, mbpp, gsm8k, mt-bench, arena-hard, humaneval-plus, mbpp-plus, math, mmlu-pro exist there), so this appears to be a proposed addition — if added, it should use 9.03, not 9.04, with sourceUrl https://lk.instruct.kr/ and a note specifying the "default" prompt strategy to disambiguate from the 1-shot/cot-1-shot variants.]
HF model card 'Instruction Benchmarks' table, Wild Bench row (sits alongside MT Bench 8.63 and Arena Hard 73.2, both already tracked; Wild Bench itself was missing from the corpus entry).

verificationNotes: Real release confirmed via mistral.ai/news/mistral-large-2407/ (fetched): 123B dense, 128k ctx, released 2024-07-24, Mistral Research License (HF model card literally says 'Mistral AI Research License' / license tag 'mrl', non-commercial). All 4 result rows independently confirmed literally present on their cited pages: MMLU 84.0 (mistral.ai blog), HumanEval 92%, MBPP Base 80%, GSM8K 93% (all on HF model card, also corroborated by an independent MarkTechPost article). No corrections needed.
